sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Users, Activity, Calendar, DollarSign, Clock, FileText, CheckCircle, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; import { registerDoctor } from '../services/auth'; import api from '../services/api'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; export default function Dashboard() { const role = localStorage.getItem('role') || 'ADMIN'; const username = localStorage.getItem('username') || 'User'; const [stats, setStats] = useState({ patients: 0, doctors: 0, appointments: 0, revenue: 0 }); const [recentAppointments, setRecentAppointments] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { async function loadStats() { try { const [patRes, docRes, apptRes, billRes] = await Promise.all([ api.get('/patients').catch(() => ({data: []})), api.get('/doctors').catch(() => ({data: []})), api.get('/appointments').catch(() => ({data: []})), api.get('/billing').catch(() => ({data: []})) ]); const patients = patRes.data || []; const doctors = docRes.data || []; const appointments = apptRes.data || []; const bills = billRes.data || []; let rev = 0; bills.forEach(b => { if(b.paymentStatus === 'Paid') rev += parseFloat(b.amount) }); setStats({ patients: patients.length, doctors: doctors.length, appointments: appointments.length, revenue: rev }); setRecentAppointments(appointments.slice(0, 3)); } catch (e) { console.error("Failed to load dashboard stats", e); } } loadStats(); }, []); const revenueData = [ { name: 'Total Revenue', revenue: stats.revenue } ]; const AdminDashboard = () => ( <>

Total Patients

{stats.patients}

Total Doctors

{stats.doctors}

Total Appointments

{stats.appointments}

Total Revenue

${stats.revenue}

Revenue Analytics

Manage Doctors

To add a new doctor into the system, go to the Manage Doctors page where you can enter their name, specialization, and contact details.

Go to Doctors Page

Recent Appointments

{recentAppointments.length === 0 ? ( ) : recentAppointments.map(a => ( ))}
Patient Name Doctor Date & Time
No appointments found.
{a.patient?.name || a.patientId} {a.doctor?.name || a.doctorId} {a.date} {a.time}
); const DoctorDashboard = () => ( <>

Total Appointments

{stats.appointments}

Total Patients

{stats.patients}

Recent Appointments

{recentAppointments.length === 0 ? ( ) : recentAppointments.map(a => ( ))}
Patient Name Date & Time
No appointments found.
{a.patient?.name || a.patientId} {a.date} {a.time}

Quick Actions

View Schedule View Patients
); const PatientDashboard = () => ( <>

My Appointments

{stats.appointments}

My Appointments

Book New
{recentAppointments.length === 0 ? ( ) : recentAppointments.map(a => ( ))}
Doctor Date & Time
No appointments found.
{a.doctor?.name || a.doctorId} {a.date} {a.time}
); return (

Welcome back, {username}

Here's what's happening in your clinic today.

{role === 'ADMIN' && } {role === 'DOCTOR' && } {role === 'PATIENT' && }
); }
